# Native Config Overlay: Gate Result IR

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/securitynativeconfigoverlaydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to native-config-overlay](../native-config-overlay.md)

| Result | EventType | Producer |
| --- | --- | --- |
| gate pass | no `PolicyViolationDetected(...)`; next step proceeds | none; progress itself is evidence |
| gate fail | `PolicyViolationDetected(category, subject, severity)`, then `BlockerRaised(category=POLICY_*)` when applicable | caller context |
| policy bundle switch | `PolicyBundleSwitched(from, to)` | reserved C7/C2 contract vocabulary |
| scoped token issue | `SecretsScopeIssued(scopeID, ttl, purpose)` | reserved C7/C2 contract vocabulary |
| scoped token revoke | `SecretsScopeRevoked(scopeID, reason)` | reserved C7/C2 contract vocabulary |

Implemented local evidence currently anchors `PolicyViolationDetected`, `PolicyBundleVersion`, and `NativeConfigVersion`. Formal value and payload catalogs are owned by the public `riido-contracts/ir` C2 event catalog.
